mapper.select: SELECT id, user_name, email, full_name, password_hash, date_of_birth, phone_number, is_active, created_at, updated_at FROM users WHERE email LIKE '%@' || #{domain} LIMIT 100
SELECT id, user_name, email, full_name, password_hash, date_of_birth, phone_number, is_active, created_at, updated_at FROM users ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users (user_name, email, full_name, password_hash, date_of_birth, phone_number, is_active, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{UserName}, #{Email}, #{FullName}, #{PasswordHash}, #{DateOfBirth}, #{PhoneNumber}, #{IsActive}, #{CreatedAt}, #{UpdatedAt}) RETURNING id
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET user_name = #{UserName}, email = #{Email}, full_name = #{FullName}, phone_number = #{PhoneNumber}, is_active = #{IsActive}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{Id}
mapper.select: SELECT u.id, u.user_name, u.email, u.full_name, u.password_hash, u.date_of_birth, u.phone_number, u.is_active, u.created_at, u.updated_at, a.id AS address_id, a.user_id, a.address_type, a.street_address, a.city, a.state, a.postal_code, a.country, a.is_default, a.created_at AS address_created_at, a.updated_at AS address_updated_at FROM users u LEFT JOIN addresses a ON u.id = a.user_id WHERE u.id = #{id}
SELECT a.country AS Key, COUNT(DISTINCT u.id) AS Value FROM users u INNER JOIN addresses a ON u.id = a.user_id GROUP BY a.country ORDER BY Value DESC

SELECT id, user_name, email, full_name, password_hash, date_of_birth, phone_number, is_active, created_at, updated_at FROM users
AND user_name LIKE '%' || #{userName} || '%'
AND email LIKE '%' || #{email} || '%'
AND is_active = #{isActive}
ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1000
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO users (user_name, email, full_name, password_hash, date_of_birth, phone_number, is_active, created_at, updated_at) VALUES
(#{user.UserName}, #{user.Email}, #{user.FullName}, #{user.PasswordHash}, #{user.DateOfBirth}, #{user.PhoneNumber}, #{user.IsActive}, #{user.CreatedAt}, #{user.UpdatedAt})
